name: sunoflow
description: SunoFlow plugin -- AI music creation and management (song generation, lyrics, stem separation, music videos, playlists, exports) via the remote SunoFlow MCP server. Ships the sunoflow skill plus a .mcp.json pointing at the hosted Streamable-HTTP endpoint -- just set SUNOFLOW_API_KEY and you are connected. Self-hosters can override SUNOFLOW_BASE_URL.
